perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action video begins with a young woman in a black shirt and denim skirt standing in front of the 'Mimian' store, holding shopping bags and gesturing towards the shop. (2) Transition to the store's interior, showing pink-toned decor, wooden shelves filled with cookie tins, and a digital menu board. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor living room where two women, one wearing a zebra-print hat, are sitting at a table with a box of lemon Boston pie. They slice the cake and show the cream layers to the camera. (4) Close-up shots of a yellow cookie tin being opened to reveal circular cookies, followed by the women tasting them and reacting positively. (5) Final montage of various cookie flavors displayed on the store shelves.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop music starts and continues throughout the video. A high-pitched, energetic female voice begins speaking about her shopping experience. (2) Two female voices engage in a lively conversation, describing the texture and flavor of the lemon Boston pie and pork floss cookies. (3) Sounds of a tin lid clicking open and forks clinking against plates are audible over the music and dialogue. (4) The music remains constant in volume and tempo until the very end, where it fades out with a final recommendation from the speakers.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text in colorful bubbles: '台中必買' (Must-buy in Taichung) and '妹妹買了什麼' (What did sister buy?). (2) Product labels: '肉鬆曲奇' (Pork floss cookies) and '檸檬生乳波士頓派' (Lemon fresh cream Boston pie). (3) Rating display: '1-10分 我們會給 9分' (1-10 points, we give it 9 points) with animated star effects. (4) Decorative text: '超級讚' (Super great), '完美比例' (Perfect ratio), and '小時肉鬆' (Childhood pork floss).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store front -> Interior store tour -> Tasting and review at home -> Final recommendations and store highlight.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female hosts, 2 female staff/customers briefly visible in the store background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a black top with a blue skirt. The second woman wears a zebra-patterned bucket hat and a white sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A bright, modern bakery with pink walls, arched displays, and wooden shelving. Later, a cozy indoor living room with a neutral-colored sofa and soft lighting.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio-like lighting in the store, warm natural-looking light indoors.
visual_scene_and_style.season: Winter (Christmas tree and snowflake decorations visible in store)

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Store Exploration -> Product Review -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle and food promotion for the 'Mimian' bakery. By combining a physical store tour with an enthusiastic tasting review of their signature lemon Boston pie and cookies, the creators aim to influence viewers to visit the new store location in Taichung and purchase these specific products.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of the store name, showing the address/new branch location, and a detailed positive review of branded packaging and products.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of high-contrast, colorful text bubbles and a collaborative reviewing style between two friends.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets young urban consumers who enjoy trendy food and 'Instagrammable' store locations. The Christmas decorations suggest a holiday-themed shopping push.
